studies.title: Evaluation of the online-based self-help program "Selfapy" for patients with generalized anxiety disorder

_verification.reason: The study specifically evaluates the 'Selfapy' online-based self-help program for generalized anxiety disorder, which matches the product 'Selfapys Online-Kurs bei Generalisierter Angststörung'. The trial registration and full text confirm the intervention is the Selfapy program developed by Selfapy GmbH.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a randomized controlled parallel group study, which indicates that participants are randomly allocated to different groups to evaluate the effectiveness of the intervention under controlled conditions.
